_comment: Example per-model calibration produced by tools/run_calibration.py. tau is the readiness threshold; beta the false-cut rate it induces; gamma the post-knee tail bound (99th-percentile past-knee loss). end_of_thinking_id is the token id of the model's end-of-thinking marker and must be set per tokenizer. Values below are illustrative placeholders; regenerate for your model.
